RichText.Text: 1. to present the research to be discussed 2. in summary to sum up 3. an extremely valuable research 4. emphasize the value of... 5. expose the children to different languages be exposed to... an exposure to... 6. provide them with musical education for their overall development 7. suggest replacing music lessons with... 8. find your smartphone missing/lost 9. Anxiety rates increased by 25% globally. 10. due to our growing dependence on... depend more on... independent adj. independence n. 11. at the expense/cost of meaningful engagement expensive adj. inexpensive adj.

TextRun.Text: 3. 一项极其有价值的研究
牺牲有意义的人际互动

RichText.Text: 1. 介绍/呈现将要讨论的研究 2. 总之 总结一下 3. 一项极其有价值的研究 4. 强调……的价值 5. 让/使孩子接触不同的语言 接触到…… 一次接触…… 6. 为他们提供音乐教育 以促进全面发展 7. 建议用音乐课替代…… 8. 发现你的智能手机不见了 9. 全球焦虑率上升了25% 10. 由于我们日益依赖…… 更依赖…… 独立的 独立性 11. 以牺牲有意义的人际互动为代价 昂贵的 不昂贵的
